This specific course in profit and prospered are repeat successful actions. This is the literal secret to success. Repeat successful actions. Repeat successful actions. What I'm trying to tell you is that when you move through life, I had a mentor one time, a guy that I worked for for 13 months. I was a digital marketing specialist named Grant Cardone. I remember one time I was feeling a little creative. I was like, I'm going to come up with a new email today and I'm going to send this out. I'm going to try this new ad. You know what happened? Grant came in and he leaned over my shoulder and he was like, Jeremy, who's done this before? I was like, what do you mean? He was like, you just came up with this email. You're going to send it to 300,000 people. How do you know it's going to work? I was like, I don't. We're going to test it. And he goes, dude, are you dumbass? You're going to repeat successful actions. You're going to go out of your way to figure out who's already sent the email. How many emails do you think have been sent in life, Jeremy? I was like, I don't know. He goes, how many do we send a month? I go, I'll about a million. We send a million emails a month a time. He goes, I bet there's somebody else out there who's sent a lot more emails than you have. You know you've been sending a lot of emails. I bet there's somebody out there who already has successful action. I bet somebody's already done something that's going to work right now instead of you trying to create something. Dude, repeat successful actions. This applies to when you're going to try something new. Look for people who have already done it. Seek a mentor, seek counsel. Look at a literal online course or something that you can learn step by step how to repeat the successful action rather than figuring out or being creative and trying to do something on your own. Repeat successful actions. If you in life are doing an online ad and it works and then you try 10 other ones and then they all don't work. Dude, are you dumbass? Continue doing the one that works. Repeat successful actions. When you say this out loud, it just makes you feel so positioned to say, wow, why have I ever tried to do anything in life and I could literally look at everything everybody else has done to start profit and prosper. That would be successful action.
